summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-1 is addressed in CreateFundDialog.tsx with an optional numeric Initial Balance field. REQ-2 appears to be addressed in backend/main.mo (though truncated, the file was modified). REQ-3 is addressed in useQueries.ts with initialBalance forwarded in the useCreateFund mutation. All major acceptance criteria appear met, including success toast with balance amount, validation, and backward compatibility. The backend change is truncated so full verification of the inflow transaction logic is limited, but the frontend changes are complete and correct.

missing_requirements.requirement: The createFund backend function accepts an optional initialBalance argument and creates an initial inflow transaction when > 0.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the createFund function signature or the inflow transaction logic, so it cannot be fully verified that the optional initialBalance parameter and automatic inflow transaction were implemented.
